name: ip-legal
description: Runs first-pass trademark clearance and freedom-to-operate triage, screens invention disclosures for initial patentability, drafts and triages cease-and-desist letters and DMCA takedowns (send and respond), checks open source compliance, reviews IP clauses, and tracks registrations and renewal deadlines.

interface.shortDescription: Runs first-pass trademark clearance and freedom-to-operate triage, screens invention disclosures for initial patentability, drafts and tria…
interface.longDescription: Runs first-pass trademark clearance and freedom-to-operate triage, screens invention disclosures for initial patentability, drafts and triages cease-and-desist letters and DMCA takedowns (send and respond), checks open source compliance, reviews IP clauses, and tracks registrations and renewal deadlines. Migrated for Codex as a repo-scoped plugin. V1 supports local files and pasted text by default; remote connectors must be configured separately.
defaultPrompt: Use IP Legal with local files or pasted text.
